Appearances:
Plaintiff Yerba Buena Commons Associates, Inc. is present. Represented by Mitchell Brown.
Attorney James Oddie appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Francisco Velaquez is present.
Attorney Dennis Sinclitico representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Karnow, counsel and litigants confer in D608.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of APR-30-2012 is vacated.
